types.name: Product Vision
types.purpose: Articulate the long-term aspirational end-state the product serves

types.name: Product Strategy
types.purpose: Define which problems matter most and the bets to win

types.name: Business Case
types.purpose: Justify investment by weighing benefits, costs, risks, alignment

types.name: Business Model Canvas
types.purpose: One-page model of how the business creates, delivers, captures value

types.name: Lean Canvas
types.purpose: Problem-focused one-pager for startups

types.name: OKRs
types.purpose: Set measurable objectives and key results to align teams

types.name: Product Operating Model / Team Topology doc
types.purpose: Define how product teams are structured and empowered

types.name: North Star Metric definition
types.purpose: Define the single metric proxying delivered value plus input metrics

types.name: Strategic Theme / Portfolio Vision
types.purpose: Connect enterprise strategy to portfolio investment

types.name: Market Requirements Document
types.purpose: Capture market problem, size, and segment needs

types.name: Competitive Analysis
types.purpose: Map competitors' strengths, weaknesses, positioning

types.name: Market Sizing / TAM-SAM-SOM model
types.purpose: Quantify addressable market opportunity

types.name: Positioning Statement
types.purpose: Define who the product is for and why it wins

types.name: Messaging Framework
types.purpose: Establish consistent value narrative and proof points

types.name: Win/Loss Analysis
types.purpose: Understand why deals are won or lost

types.name: Pricing & Packaging document
types.purpose: Define price tiers, packaging, and rationale

types.name: Voice of Customer report
types.purpose: Aggregate customer signals from interviews, support, community

types.name: User Research Report
types.purpose: Synthesize research findings and recommendations

types.name: User Persona
types.purpose: Represent a user segment's goals, behaviors, pains

types.name: Empathy Map
types.purpose: Capture what a user says, thinks, does, feels

types.name: Jobs-to-be-Done statement
types.purpose: Frame the progress a customer is trying to make

types.name: Opportunity Solution Tree
types.purpose: Map outcome to opportunities to solutions to experiments

types.name: Customer Journey Map
types.purpose: Visualize a persona's end-to-end experience and pain points

types.name: Service Blueprint
types.purpose: Map front-stage and back-stage processes supporting a journey

types.name: Interview Guide / Discussion Guide
types.purpose: Standardize questions for user interviews

types.name: Survey Instrument
types.purpose: Collect structured quantitative/qualitative input

types.name: Concept Test / Validation Brief
types.purpose: Validate a concept's desirability before build

types.name: Diary Study / Field Study plan
types.purpose: Plan longitudinal/in-context observation

types.name: Product Requirements Document
types.purpose: Define what to build, for whom, and why, with scope and success criteria

types.name: User Story
types.purpose: Describe a feature from the user's perspective

types.name: Epic
types.purpose: Group related stories under a larger body of work

types.name: Software Requirements Specification
types.purpose: Document functional and non-functional requirements formally

types.name: Functional Specification
types.purpose: Detail required system behavior and functions

types.name: Non-Functional Requirements doc
types.purpose: Specify performance, security, scalability, reliability targets

types.name: Use Case specification
types.purpose: Describe actor-system interactions to achieve a goal

types.name: Business Requirements Document
types.purpose: Capture high-level business needs and objectives

types.name: Requirements Traceability Matrix
types.purpose: Link requirements to design, code, tests, and risk controls

types.name: Acceptance Criteria
types.purpose: Define conditions a story must meet to be accepted

types.name: Definition of Done
types.purpose: Shared quality standard for "done" increments

types.name: Definition of Ready
types.purpose: Criteria a backlog item must meet to enter a sprint

types.name: Business Rules catalog
types.purpose: Document operational rules and decision logic

types.name: Data Requirements / Data Model
types.purpose: Define data entities, attributes, relationships

types.name: Amazon PR/FAQ
types.purpose: Force customer-centric clarity before building by writing the launch announcement first

types.name: Amazon Six-Pager
types.purpose: Present a proposal or review as a dense 6-page prose narrative read silently in-meeting

types.name: Shape Up Pitch
types.purpose: Present a shaped bet with bounded appetite for the betting table

types.name: Breadboard / Fat-Marker Sketch
types.purpose: Communicate solution shape at low fidelity to preserve team latitude

types.name: Software Design Document
types.purpose: Describe the technical design and how the system will be built

types.name: Request for Comments (engineering)
types.purpose: Propose a technical change for open discussion before deciding

types.name: API Specification
types.purpose: Define API endpoints, schemas, auth, and contracts

types.name: Interface Control Document
types.purpose: Define interfaces between systems/components

types.name: Configuration / Environment specification
types.purpose: Define environment, configuration, and infrastructure requirements

types.name: Wireframe
types.purpose: Show layout and structure without visual styling

types.name: High-Fidelity Mockup
types.purpose: Present pixel-accurate visual design

types.name: Interactive Prototype
types.purpose: Simulate interactions for testing and as specification

types.name: Design System / UI Kit
types.purpose: Provide reusable components, tokens, and usage rules

types.name: Information Architecture / Sitemap
types.purpose: Define content structure and navigation

types.name: User Flow / Task Flow
types.purpose: Map the steps and decisions a user takes through a task

types.name: Architecture Diagram (C4 model)
types.purpose: Visualize architecture at hierarchical levels of detail

types.name: arc42 Architecture Documentation
types.purpose: Provide a comprehensive, structured architecture description

types.name: 4+1 / Views & Beyond / ISO 42010 architecture views
types.purpose: Document architecture via stakeholder-specific views

types.name: Data Flow Diagram
types.purpose: Model how data moves through processes, stores, and boundaries

types.name: Database Schema / Data Model (physical)
types.purpose: Define physical database structure

types.name: Deployment / Infrastructure Architecture
types.purpose: Document runtime topology and infrastructure

types.name: Architecture Decision Record
types.purpose: Capture a significant architectural decision with context and consequences

types.name: Decision Log
types.purpose: Track key decisions, rationale, owners, dates

types.name: Trade Study / Options Analysis
types.purpose: Evaluate options against weighted criteria

types.name: Spike / Research Spike report
types.purpose: Time-boxed investigation to reduce uncertainty

types.name: Product Roadmap
types.purpose: Communicate sequence and timing of product outcomes/features

types.name: Release Plan
types.purpose: Plan what ships in which release and when

types.name: Project Charter
types.purpose: Formally authorize the project and grant PM authority

types.name: Project Brief
types.purpose: Lightweight project definition for smaller efforts

types.name: Project Management Plan
types.purpose: Define how the project is executed, monitored, controlled

types.name: Work Breakdown Structure
types.purpose: Decompose project scope into manageable work packages

types.name: Project Schedule / Gantt Chart
types.purpose: Sequence activities with dependencies and dates

types.name: Product Backlog
types.purpose: Ordered, emergent list of all work to improve the product

types.name: Sprint Backlog
types.purpose: Selected items plus plan for one sprint

types.name: SAFe PI Objectives
types.purpose: Business-value-weighted goals each team commits to for a PI

types.name: SAFe Program Board / ART Planning Board
types.purpose: Visualize features, milestones, cross-team dependencies across a PI

types.name: ROAM Board
types.purpose: Categorize and manage PI risks

types.name: Team Charter
types.purpose: Establish team purpose, norms, roles, working agreements

types.name: Capacity / Resource Plan
types.purpose: Plan people and capacity against demand

types.name: Dependency Map / Dependency Log
types.purpose: Track and visualize inter-team/inter-system dependencies

types.name: Communication Management Plan
types.purpose: Define who receives what information, how, and when

types.name: Estimate / Story Point Estimate
types.purpose: Quantify relative effort of work items

types.name: Appetite statement
types.purpose: State fixed time the org will invest, constraining the solution

types.name: Cost Estimate / Budget
types.purpose: Estimate and baseline project costs

types.name: Velocity / Throughput report
types.purpose: Track historical delivery rate to inform forecasting

types.name: Sprint Goal
types.purpose: Single objective giving the sprint coherence

types.name: Product Increment
types.purpose: The sum of completed, done work delivered each sprint

types.name: Standup Notes / Daily Scrum update
types.purpose: Capture daily progress, plan, impediments

types.name: Impediment Log / Blocker List
types.purpose: Track and resolve impediments

types.name: Sprint Review notes / Demo record
types.purpose: Record stakeholder feedback on the increment

types.name: Backlog Refinement notes
types.purpose: Capture refinement outcomes and clarifications

types.name: Kanban Board
types.purpose: Visualize work-in-progress across workflow states

types.name: Cumulative Flow Diagram
types.purpose: Visualize flow, WIP, and bottlenecks over time

types.name: Burndown / Burnup Chart
types.purpose: Track remaining/completed work against time

types.name: Kickoff Deck / Project Kickoff doc
types.purpose: Align team and stakeholders at project/cycle start

types.name: Design Review record
types.purpose: Document design review decisions and feedback

types.name: Architecture Review record
types.purpose: Document architecture review board outcomes

types.name: Working Agreement / Ground Rules
types.purpose: Document agreed team behaviors and norms

types.name: Confidence Vote record
types.purpose: Capture team confidence in committed plan

types.name: Test Plan
types.purpose: Define test scope, approach, resources, schedule

types.name: Test Strategy
types.purpose: Define organization-wide testing approach and standards

types.name: Test Case
types.purpose: Define steps, data, and expected results to verify behavior

types.name: Test Suite / Test Scenario
types.purpose: Group related test cases under a scenario

types.name: Test Report / Test Summary Report
types.purpose: Summarize test execution outcomes and quality status

types.name: Bug Report / Defect Report
types.purpose: Document a defect with reproduction and severity

types.name: Defect Triage log / Bug Bash notes
types.purpose: Track, prioritize, and assign defects

types.name: Test Automation Plan / Framework doc
types.purpose: Define automation scope, framework, and standards

types.name: User Acceptance Test plan
types.purpose: Plan validation by end users against business needs

types.name: Software Verification & Validation Plan
types.purpose: Define verification and validation activities formally

types.name: Performance / Load Test plan
types.purpose: Plan performance, load, and stress testing

types.name: Security Test plan / Penetration Test report
types.purpose: Plan and report security testing and findings

types.name: Test Data Management plan
types.purpose: Define test data needs, generation, and privacy

types.name: Release Notes
types.purpose: Communicate what changed in a release to users/stakeholders

types.name: Runbook
types.purpose: Provide step-by-step procedures for routine and recovery operations

types.name: Playbook
types.purpose: Provide scenario-specific response procedures

types.name: Deployment Plan
types.purpose: Plan the steps, sequencing, and rollback for a deployment

types.name: Rollback / Back-out Plan
types.purpose: Define how to revert a failed deployment

types.name: Change Request
types.purpose: Formally request and authorize a production change

types.name: Release / Deployment Checklist
types.purpose: Verify readiness criteria before deployment

types.name: Feature Flag / Rollout configuration record
types.purpose: Document feature flags and gradual rollout settings

types.name: Release Calendar / Release Schedule
types.purpose: Communicate planned releases and windows

types.name: Configuration Management Plan
types.purpose: Define how configuration items are identified and controlled

types.name: Production Readiness Review
types.purpose: Assess whether a service is ready for production

types.name: Launch Coordination Checklist
types.purpose: Coordinate cross-team launch readiness

types.name: Incident Postmortem
types.purpose: Learn from an incident and prevent recurrence (blamelessly)

types.name: Incident Report / Incident Record
types.purpose: Record an active incident's status and response

types.name: Service Level Objective document
types.purpose: Define reliability targets and indicators

types.name: Error Budget Policy
types.purpose: Define consequences when error budget is exhausted

types.name: Service Level Agreement
types.purpose: Contractual reliability commitment with penalties

types.name: On-call / Escalation Policy
types.purpose: Define on-call rotation and escalation paths

types.name: Monitoring / Alerting plan
types.purpose: Define what to monitor and when to alert

types.name: Capacity Plan (ops)
types.purpose: Forecast and plan infrastructure capacity

types.name: Disaster Recovery / Business Continuity Plan
types.purpose: Plan recovery from major disruptions

types.name: Production Meeting Minutes / Ops Review
types.purpose: Track ongoing operational health and actions

types.name: Support Knowledge Base article / FAQ
types.purpose: Provide self-service answers to common issues

types.name: Maintenance / Deprecation plan
types.purpose: Plan the wind-down, migration, and retirement of a product/feature

types.name: KPI Dashboard
types.purpose: Visualize key metrics for monitoring and decisions

types.name: Tracking Plan
types.purpose: Define events, properties, and user traits to instrument

types.name: Data Dictionary
types.purpose: Document the meaning and usage of events and metrics

types.name: Experiment Design doc
types.purpose: Define hypothesis, variants, metrics, and analysis for an experiment

types.name: Experiment Readout / Results report
types.purpose: Report experiment outcomes and decision

types.name: Metric Tree
types.purpose: Decompose a top metric into contributing input metrics

types.name: Cohort / Retention analysis
types.purpose: Analyze behavior and retention by cohort

types.name: Funnel Analysis
types.purpose: Analyze conversion through a multi-step flow

types.name: Analytics Requirements / Measurement Plan
types.purpose: Define how a feature's success will be measured

types.name: ML Experiment Tracking record
types.purpose: Log model hyperparameters, metrics, dataset/code versions

types.name: Model Card / Datasheet for Datasets
types.purpose: Document a model's intended use, performance, limitations

types.name: Risk Register
types.purpose: Track risks with likelihood, impact, owner, mitigation

types.name: RAID Log
types.purpose: Consolidate Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies

types.name: Issue Log
types.purpose: Track active issues needing resolution

types.name: Assumption Log
types.purpose: Track assumptions and constraints

types.name: Change Log (governance)
types.purpose: Track requested and approved changes to baselines

types.name: Threat Model
types.purpose: Identify and prioritize security threats to a system

types.name: Software Bill of Materials
types.purpose: Inventory software components and dependencies

types.name: Risk Management File (ISO 14971)
types.purpose: Provide traceable evidence of medical-device risk management

types.name: Design History File
aliases: DHF (FDA); aligns to Medical Device File under QMSR
types.purpose: Compile records demonstrating design developed per plan and regulation

types.name: Design and Development Plan (regulated)
types.purpose: Document/reference planned design activities and responsibilities

types.name: Design Inputs document
types.purpose: Capture required device characteristics from intended use and user needs

types.name: Design Outputs document
types.purpose: Document design results enabling conformance evaluation to inputs

types.name: Design Review records (regulated)
types.purpose: Record formal staged design reviews with independent reviewer

types.name: Design Verification protocol & report
types.purpose: Confirm design outputs meet design inputs

types.name: Design Validation protocol & report
types.purpose: Confirm device meets user needs/intended use on production units

types.name: Design Transfer documentation
types.purpose: Ensure design is correctly translated into production specs

types.name: Design Changes record
types.purpose: Identify, verify/validate, review, approve design changes before implementation

types.name: Device Master Record
aliases: DMR; aligns to Medical Device File (MDF) under QMSR
types.purpose: Compile all specs and procedures to manufacture the finished device

types.name: Device History Record
types.purpose: Prove a batch/unit was manufactured per the DMR

types.name: Installation/Operational/Performance Qualification protocols
types.purpose: Validate manufacturing processes/equipment with documented evidence

types.name: Validation Master Plan
types.purpose: Define overall validation strategy and scope across systems

types.name: 21 CFR Part 11 / Computer System Validation package
types.purpose: Validate computerized systems and electronic records/signatures

types.name: SOC 2 System Description
types.purpose: Describe in-scope infrastructure and how the system meets criteria

types.name: SOC 2 Management Assertion
types.purpose: Assert how the system is designed, operates, and meets commitments

types.name: SOC 2 Control Matrix
types.purpose: Map controls to Trust Services Criteria with owners and evidence
relationships: core SOC 2 doc; maps to evidence

types.name: Information Security Policy set
aliases: InfoSec policies (access control, acceptable use, change mgmt, data classification, incident response, etc.)
types.purpose: Document security governance for audits and operations

types.name: GDPR Records of Processing Activities
types.purpose: Document personal-data processing activities

types.name: Data Protection Impact Assessment
types.purpose: Assess privacy risks of high-risk processing

types.name: Audit Report / Compliance Evidence package
types.purpose: Compile evidence and findings for an audit

types.name: Accessibility Conformance Report
types.purpose: Document accessibility conformance level

types.name: Status Report
types.purpose: Communicate progress, risks, and next steps to stakeholders

types.name: Stakeholder Map / Register
types.purpose: Identify and categorize stakeholders and engagement approach

types.name: RACI Matrix
types.purpose: Clarify roles and responsibilities across activities

types.name: Executive Briefing / Steering Committee deck
types.purpose: Brief executives on status, decisions needed, asks

types.name: Meeting Notes / Minutes
types.purpose: Record decisions and action items from a meeting

types.name: FAQ document
types.purpose: Answer anticipated questions for an audience

types.name: Announcement / Internal Comms
types.purpose: Announce changes or launches to internal/external audiences

types.name: Sprint Retrospective notes
types.purpose: Capture what went well, what to improve, and actions

types.name: Project / Milestone Retrospective
types.purpose: Capture lessons at project/milestone close

types.name: PI / Release Retrospective
types.purpose: Reflect and improve at PI/release cadence

types.name: Premortem
types.purpose: Anticipate failure modes before starting

types.name: Postmortem Action Item tracker
types.purpose: Track follow-through on postmortem/incident actions

types.name: README
types.purpose: Orient developers to a repository/project

types.name: Technical Documentation / Developer Docs
types.purpose: Provide technical reference for developers/integrators

types.name: User Manual / Help Documentation
types.purpose: Help end users accomplish tasks

types.name: Onboarding / Training Guide
types.purpose: Train internal teams or new hires on product/process

types.name: Sales Battlecard
types.purpose: Equip sales to position against competitors

types.name: Sales Playbook / Demo Script
types.purpose: Provide repeatable sales motions and demo guidance

types.name: Runbook (knowledge) / Standard Operating Procedure
types.purpose: Document a repeatable internal process

types.name: Style Guide / Content Guidelines
types.purpose: Standardize content voice, tone, and conventions

types.name: Statement of Work
types.purpose: Define deliverables, timeline, and terms for contracted work

types.name: Contract / Agreement
types.purpose: Establish legally binding terms between parties

types.name: Data Processing Agreement
types.purpose: Govern personal-data processing between controller and processor

types.name: Service Level Agreement (contractual)
types.purpose: Define contractual service commitments and remedies

types.name: Terms of Service / EULA / Privacy Policy
types.purpose: Define user terms and privacy commitments

types.name: Intellectual Property / Licensing record
types.purpose: Track IP ownership and software licenses
